name: second-brain
description: An Obsidian-vault personal memory system for Claude Code: a SessionEnd hook captures every session to raw/, and skills file the queue into a topical wiki and a temporal journal via three subagents (librarian, journal-extractor, journal-grouper).

vault_path.title: Second-brain vault path
vault_path.description: Absolute path to your Obsidian second-brain vault. Leave empty to disable session capture until you run /second-brain:init-vault.
